Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). Its focus on understanding diverse cultural perspectives through translation also fosters knowledge and skills for global citizenship and appreciation of cultural diversity (Target 4.7).
evidence: This course provides an overview of translation theories/studies as an academic discipline.
